name: [BUG-SF-002] TC-SF-007 — POST /api/v1/fetch/trigger: Must return 200/202 (returns 504 or connection error)
description:
**[KNOWN BUG — BUG-SF-002] — CORE FUNCTIONALITY BROKEN**

**What this test does:**
Posts to /spr-fetcher/api/v1/fetch/trigger with a valid Bearer token and verifies the response is 200 OK or 202 Accepted with a trigger acknowledgement.

**Expected:** HTTP 200 or 202
**Actual:** HTTP 504 Gateway Timeout or a connection-level failure (no HTTP response at all)

**Root Cause (confirmed):** The status endpoint reports tokenInjectionEnabled=false (see BUG-SF-003). Without token injection, the spr-fetcher calls the KCB API without attaching a valid OAuth token. The KCB API either:
  a. Hangs on the unauthenticated request, causing the gateway to time out (504), or
  b. Resets the TCP connection immediately, causing a connection-level error (status 0)

**Impact (Critical):** The entire data ingestion pipeline for KCB financial data is completely non-functional. No SPR (Statement Print) data can be fetched, which means the RMS dashboard will show stale or empty financial data.

Root Cause (confirmed): The status endpoint reports tokenInjectionEnabled=false (see BUG-SF-003). Without token injection, the spr-fetcher calls the KCB API without attaching a valid OAuth token. The KCB API either:
a. Hangs on the unauthenticated request, causing the gateway to time out (504), or
b. Resets the TCP connection immediately, causing a connection-level error (status 0)

Impact (Critical): The entire data ingestion pipeline for KCB financial data is completely non-functional. No SPR (Statement Print) data can be fetched, which means the RMS dashboard will show stale or empty financial data.

**[KNOWN BUG — BUG-SF-002] — CORE FUNCTIONALITY BROKEN**

**What this test does:**
Posts to /spr-fetcher/api/v1/fetch/trigger with a valid Bearer token and verifies the response is 200 OK or 202 Accepted with a trigger acknowledgement.

**Expected:** HTTP 200 or 202
**Actual:** HTTP 504 Gateway Timeout or a connection-level failure (no HTTP response at all)

**Root Cause (confirmed):** The status endpoint reports tokenInjectionEnabled=false (see BUG-SF-003). Without token injection, the spr-fetcher calls the KCB API without attaching a valid OAuth token. The KCB API either:
  a. Hangs on the unauthenticated request, causing the gateway to time out (504), or
  b. Resets the TCP connection immediately, causing a connection-level error (status 0)

**Impact (Critical):** The entire data ingestion pipeline for KCB financial data is completely non-functional. No SPR (Statement Print) data can be fetched, which means the RMS dashboard will show stale or empty financial data.
